evals.name: n1-query-detection

evals.name: deprecation-check
evals.prompt: Review this snippet: 'import { List } from "antd"; export function TaskList({ tasks }) { return <List dataSource={tasks} renderItem={task => <List.Item>{task.title}</List.Item>} />; }'
